title: agrostis stolonifera var. alba
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. alba, also known as white creeping bent, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. alba include its potential to soothe digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
